nasb.text: The more they called them, The more they went from them; They kept sacrificing to the Baals And burning incense to idols.

esv.text: The more they were called, the more they went away; they kept sacrificing to the Baals and burning offerings to idols.

cnv.text: 可是我越發呼喚他們， 他們越發走開； 他們給巴力獻祭， 向偶像燒香。

ccb.text: 可是，我越召唤他们，他们就跑得越远， 给巴力献祭，向偶像烧香。
